sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45729" key="e)fhlw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφηλ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n45729.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φολλικώδεα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
